notes: Refers to a registered or informal group of people united by a common interest, such as a sports club, charity, or hobby group.

sentences.german: Er ist Mitglied in einem Fußballverein.
sentences.english: He is a member of a football club.

sentences.german: Die Vereine in unserer Stadt organisieren viele Veranstaltungen.
sentences.english: The clubs in our city organize many events.
